title: Conjecture 1.1 (Neumann-Lara)
arxiv_excerpt: Every oriented planar graph is 2-colourable.
paper_contribution: Proves a relaxed version: every planar digraph of digirth at least 4 is 2-colourable (the previously known result required digirth at least 5).

title: Rebels = Poset Tournaments Conjecture

paper_contribution: The paper notes that proving $S_k$ is a rebel for every $k$ would imply Conjecture 5.3, thereby connecting this conjecture to the clique-number framework developed in the paper.

title: Erdős-Hajnal Conjecture (Conjecture 1.1)
arxiv_excerpt: For every graph $H$, there exists $\tau>0$ such that every $n$-vertex $H$-free graph has a clique or stable set of size at least $n^{\tau}$.

title: Erdős-Hajnal Conjecture (Conjecture 1.1)
arxiv_excerpt: Every proper hereditary class of graphs has the Erdős-Hajnal property.
paper_contribution: Proves the conjecture for the special case of all proper hereditary classes of bounded VC-dimension (Theorem 1.2), and for all two-colourable tournaments in the tournament setting (Theorem 6.3).

title: Pach–Tóth Conjecture
arxiv_excerpt: For every fixed $k$, the maximum number of edges in an $n$-vertex simple topological graph with no $k$ pairwise disjoint edges is at most $O_k(n)$.
paper_contribution: Theorem 1.2 establishes that every $n$-vertex simple topological graph with no $k$ pairwise disjoint edges has at most $n(\log n)^{O(\log k)}$ edges, improving the prior bound of $O(n \log^{4k-8} n)$.
